title: picea alcoquiana var. reflexa
intro: Picea alcoquiana var. reflexa, also known as the Japanese white fir, is a coniferous evergreen tree species native to Japan. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Picea alcoquiana var. reflexa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the needles and twigs of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat various health conditions.
